channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: DashCon Returns: A Revival of Internet History and Fandom Culture - A New Era for Fans
item.description: DashCon, the infamous 2014 fan convention, is back with a new twist. Learn about the revival of DashCon, its new focus on internet history, and what fans can expect from this revamped event.
item.dc:creator: Major Digest

item.title: Protect Yourself: Expert Strategies for Identity Theft Prevention and Recovery
item.description: Identity theft happens every 22 seconds, but you don't have to be a statistic. Learn expert-backed strategies to shield your identity from cybercriminals and what to do if you fall victim to identity theft.
item.dc:creator: Major Digest
